node.plaintext:
Project Recap
It has now been a little while since our latest Community Update and since then,
the Particl team has been extremely busy and a LOT has been happening! This
Community Update will break down everything you need to know about the status of
the project and put you up to speed with what’s going on.

We’ve broken this Community Update down into 3 pieces. This first part will
recapitulate what’s been happening with the project since our last update. If
you want to jump right into the NYC Blockchain Week recap or the Development
Update, follow the links below to jump:

 * NYC Blockchain Week Recap
   [https://particl.news/community-update-13-part-2-f4ca972abed0]
 * Development Update
   [https://particl.news/community-update-13-part-3-4d53bcf621af]


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

What’s Been Accomplished Since our Last Community Update
2019 has been a busy year so far, and one that is shaping up to be pretty
different than the last one. Whereas last year was focused on building the base
layer for the Open Marketplace, this year has been all about refining it and
starting to add new features on top of it. That doesn’t mean, however, that the
only milestones reached this year were about the marketplace! Here’s a complete
list of all the accomplishments and deliverables Particl had so far this year:

Particl Copay 5.4.1 Released
[https://particl.news/particl-copay-5-4-1-released-3fb50d486a44] (Jan 17th): A
new version of Particl Copay was released on the 17th of January and marked a
renewed active development for Particl’s mobile application. This update has
been a major overhaul of the mobile application. It upgraded the application’s
codebase, introduced a slew UI/UX and security improvements, fixed a couple of
minor bugs, and enabled multi-currency support. This major Particl Copay update
was pushed to set the stage for a bigger Particl Copay update that came a few
weeks after: mobile multi-signature cold staking.

Particl Copay 5.4.1 Released
[https://particl.news/particl-copay-5-4-1-released-3fb50d486a44]
Yesterday, we released the 5.4.1 version of Particl Copay which sets the
Particl
mobile application to the latest Copay…
[https://particl.news/particl-copay-5-4-1-released-3fb50d486a44]particl.news
[https://particl.news/particl-copay-5-4-1-released-3fb50d486a44]

Particl Copay Released on iOS
[https://particl.news/particl-copay-now-available-on-ios-3a1c8ebb4b] (Jan 24th): 
Particl Copay was finally released on iOS on the 24th of January. This means
Particl’s mobile application is not exclusive to Android users anymore and now
covers all mobile users.

Particl Copay Now Available on iOS
[https://particl.news/particl-copay-now-available-on-ios-3a1c8ebb4b]
We are very excited to announce that Particl Copay, Particl’s mobile wallet, is
now available on iOS! You can now…
[https://particl.news/particl-copay-now-available-on-ios-3a1c8ebb4b]particl.news
[https://particl.news/particl-copay-now-available-on-ios-3a1c8ebb4b]

Particl Meetup at CoinHouse, Paris
[https://particl.news/particl-in-paris-presentations-at-coinhouse-a38106cdd36a] 
(February 21st): Did you know that the biggest non-official Particl community is
Particl FR, a French-speaking community? This is the reason why we organized,
along with a few community members, a Particl meetup right in the heart of Paris
at CoinHouse. The event held three presentations related to Particl and its
protocol. You can watch these presentations by clicking on the following links:

 * Particl Open Marketplace Presentation (Lina Seiche)
   [https://youtu.be/tQrDPzUGYaY]
 * Cold Staking & Cold Staking Pools Presentation (Guillaume Benayoun)
   [https://youtu.be/crzskSfKTWk]
 * The Role of Intermediaries in Blockchain eCommerce (Albin Cauderlier)
   [https://youtu.be/TfUTKTSL2-I]

Particl in Paris — Presentations at CoinHouse
[https://particl.news/particl-in-paris-presentations-at-coinhouse-a38106cdd36a]
We are thrilled to announce that Particl will be holding an event directly at
the headquarters of CoinHouse, France’s…
[https://particl.news/particl-in-paris-presentations-at-coinhouse-a38106cdd36a]
particl.news
[https://particl.news/particl-in-paris-presentations-at-coinhouse-a38106cdd36a]

Particl Desktop 1.3.1 Release (February 22nd)
[https://particl.news/particl-desktop-1-3-1-released-8802e7b326fb]: A new
version of Particl Desktop was released on the 22nd of February. This release
fixed the cold staking Zap feature to also work with cold staking pools as well
as a few other minor issues. This Particl Desktop build automatically updated
Particl Core nodes to the latest version, the one that would be compatible with
the hardfork that was about to come.

Particl Desktop 1.3.1 Released
[https://particl.news/particl-desktop-1-3-1-released-8802e7b326fb]
Earlier today, we released Particl Desktop 1.3.1 which had been in its
pre-release stage for a bit more than two weeks…
[https://particl.news/particl-desktop-1-3-1-released-8802e7b326fb]particl.news
[https://particl.news/particl-desktop-1-3-1-released-8802e7b326fb]

Particl Network Hardforks (March 1st):
[https://particl.news/hardfork-successful-8480249aac83] On March 1st, the
Particl main network went through a hardfork in order to prepare for the
mainnet
release of the Open Marketplace
[https://particl.news/development-update-planned-hardfork-schedule-5051238feac0]
. This hardfork introduced both multi-signature cold staking capabilities to the
network as well as paid SMSG messages. Paid SMSG messages are crucial to the
functioning of the Open Marketplace on mainnet as they are used to carry listing
messages around the network and make the governance system work. The hardfork
went through without any issue and the network is now ready for the mainnet
release of the marketplace.

Hardfork Successful [https://particl.news/hardfork-successful-8480249aac83]
🎉 It’s official! 🎉 [https://particl.news/hardfork-successful-8480249aac83]
particl.news [https://particl.news/hardfork-successful-8480249aac83]

Particl Moves to Discord
[https://particl.news/particl-is-officially-moving-to-discord-57c6bb52e365] 
(March 7th): The Particl communications team has been mostly moved over to
Discord. While we initially intended to move entirely on Discord and put
Telegram in read-only mode, our travels around the world have made it clear we
couldn’t do that as some countries exclusively use Telegram. Nevertheless, the
team has been mostly moved over there and our Discord server will be the main
platform we’ll focus on moving forward even though we will keep our Telegram
channel open.

Particl is Officially Moving to Discord
[https://particl.news/particl-is-officially-moving-to-discord-57c6bb52e365]
The Particl community has been spread across many different platforms ever
since
we abandoned Slack more than a year…
[https://particl.news/particl-is-officially-moving-to-discord-57c6bb52e365]
particl.news
[https://particl.news/particl-is-officially-moving-to-discord-57c6bb52e365]

Open Marketplace Alpha 2.0 Released
[https://particl.news/particl-open-marketplace-alpha-v2-0-release-development-update-d14f1df6734d] 
(March 8th): On the 8th March, Particl reached a big milestone by releasing its
Open Marketplace Alpha 2.0 on testnet. Unlike other testnet builds, this one is
a permanent one, meaning that its download link hasn’t expired after 10 days.
This release marked the completion of the base layer of the marketplace, meaning
that the development team could now start focusing on adding features on top of
it.

Particl Open Marketplace Alpha V2.0 Release & Development Update
[https://particl.news/particl-open-marketplace-alpha-v2-0-release-development-update-d14f1df6734d]
It’s finally here! The Particl Open Marketplace Alpha V2.0 has just been
released on Github and is now available for…
[https://particl.news/particl-open-marketplace-alpha-v2-0-release-development-update-d14f1df6734d]
particl.news
[https://particl.news/particl-open-marketplace-alpha-v2-0-release-development-update-d14f1df6734d]

Particl Soft Rebrand [https://particl.news/particl-has-a-new-look-1b5885a0e179] 
(March 8th): At the same time Alpha 2.0 was released, Particl went through a
soft rebrand to refresh its branding. Both Particl’s logo and color palette were
updated, paving the way for a better creative direction. The soft rebrand was
spearheaded by Gerlov van Ek, Particl’s Lead Designer, UI/UX, and developer.

Particl has a new look
[https://particl.news/particl-has-a-new-look-1b5885a0e179]
Only by being obsessed with little things do amazing things emerge. — Andy Dunn
This year Particl Project is set to…
[https://particl.news/particl-has-a-new-look-1b5885a0e179]particl.news
[https://particl.news/particl-has-a-new-look-1b5885a0e179]

Particl Booth at Hong Kong’s TOKEN2049 Conference
[https://particl.news/token2049-a-recap-review-a29d28151e0e](March 13rd-14th): A
good chunk of the Particl team took a flight to present the Open Marketplace at
TOKEN2049
[https://particl.news/particl-is-going-to-hong-kongs-token-2049-conference-e1fca540740b]
. In fact, this event, which we were a Gold sponsor for, marked the first big
conference and kick-off point for our journey of creating awareness and
introducing Particl’s first dApp, the Open Marketplace, to the crypto community.
Not only was the Particl booth one of the very popular one around, but it also
proved to be an excellent exercise for the team ahead of the two other major
conferences Particl would be having a booth at: Consensus and Magical Crypto
Conference. The team made great connections at the event and was able to gather
a lot of feedback which we’ve used since then to improve the look and feel of
the product.

TOKEN2049: A Recap & Review
[https://particl.news/token2049-a-recap-review-a29d28151e0e]
It’s one week past the big event and by now, all Particl participants have
safely made it back home. With our team…
[https://particl.news/token2049-a-recap-review-a29d28151e0e]particl.news
[https://particl.news/token2049-a-recap-review-a29d28151e0e]

New Mainnet Release Timeline Announced
[https://particl.news/marketplace-development-update-d40e055c5b12] (March 20th): 
TOKEN2049 was a great time for the team to discuss the mainnet release strategy
for the Open Marketplace. While it was initially announced that the marketplace
would be released without privacy transactions, the team had decided to respect
our commitment to privacy that we are making to our users by releasing the first
mainnet version of the marketplace with the OMP Library and private transactions
enabled by default.

Additionally, because the entire Open Marketplace had been built using the
Bitcoin Core 0.18 codebase, we opted to push the official release only after
Bitcoin itself would update its core to the 0.18 version. In the end, the
release of Bitcoin Core 0.18 was delayed for about a month, an extra period of
time the Particl team used to fine-tune and improve the OMP Library and the
escrow mechanism. Read the Development Update
[https://particl.news/community-update-13-part-3-4d53bcf621af] section of this
Community Update for more details about the status of the development and why
we’ve finally opted to not release the Open Marketplace without its intended
privacy features.

Marketplace Development Update
[https://particl.news/marketplace-development-update-d40e055c5b12]
We packed our bags and headed off to TOKEN2049 last week with the Open
Marketplace in tow. If you haven’t had a chance…
[https://particl.news/marketplace-development-update-d40e055c5b12]particl.news
[https://particl.news/marketplace-development-update-d40e055c5b12]

Multi-Wallets Make Their Way On Particl’s Testnet
[https://particl.news/new-particl-desktop-testnet-build-released-afed332e4270] 
(April 11th): The first feature that was initially scheduled for Beta to be
pushed on Particl’s Open Marketplace was multi-wallets. In fact, they’ve made
their appearance on testnet on the 11th of April and are now, to this day,
entirely ready for mainnet. For more information about what multi-wallets,
follow the link below.

Multi-Wallets on Particl Desktop
[https://particl.news/multi-wallets-on-particl-desktop-5c0c80e94076]
Multi-wallets are not new to Particl. In fact, they have been available on
Particl-Qt ever since Particl forked to…
[https://particl.news/multi-wallets-on-particl-desktop-5c0c80e94076]particl.news
[https://particl.news/multi-wallets-on-particl-desktop-5c0c80e94076]

Community Contract Pools Announced
[https://particl.news/community-contract-pools-49a2b060f370] (April 17th): 
Community Contract Pools are a creative way to crowdfund community initiatives
and get them funded the proper way. Have a Particl-related project you want to
build? Would like some integration to be worked in but it requires a fee? Want
to fund an awareness campaign? These Community Contract Pools are just like your
regular pool with the difference that instead of charging their users 2–3%, it
charges them 100%. The funds collected by the operator are then used to fund the
initiative initially proposed by the pool.

Community Contract Pools
[https://particl.news/community-contract-pools-49a2b060f370]
If you’ve been around the community for some time, then you probably know that
there have always been some discussions…
[https://particl.news/community-contract-pools-49a2b060f370]particl.news
[https://particl.news/community-contract-pools-49a2b060f370]

First Particl Lightning Network Transaction on Testnet
[https://particl.news/particl-lightning-network-now-available-on-testnet-eb87a5ab65cd] 
(May 1st): The Lightning Network is a groundbreaking protocol that supports
blockchains in order for them to sustain more transactions per seconds without
being negatively impacted by it. It allows blockchain to safely execute any sort
of transaction, including micro-transactions, instantly and at a near-zero cost.
The Particl test network saw its first LN transaction
[https://explorer-testnet.particl.io/tx/bd6f69315e9413e5f8b987fb676d192c28e8e1b15a611701bf1cdecb090f9552] 
take place on the 1st of May, which marks the official beginnings of a more
pro-active research and development on how the Lightning Network could be
integrated into Particl to improve its performance.

Particl Lightning Network Now Available on Testnet
[https://particl.news/particl-lightning-network-now-available-on-testnet-eb87a5ab65cd]
Last week, Particl’s Core Developer and Cryptographer, Tecnovert, successfully
conducted the first-ever Particl…
[https://particl.news/particl-lightning-network-now-available-on-testnet-eb87a5ab65cd]
particl.news
[https://particl.news/particl-lightning-network-now-available-on-testnet-eb87a5ab65cd]

Particl Copay Update — Mobile Cold Staking
[https://particl.news/new-particl-copay-version-released-d51c1623b313] (May
9th): Particl released a major update for its mobile application on the 9th of
May. Indeed, this update introduced cold staking capabilities to Particl Copay
as well as the possibility to enable cold staking for multi-signature addresses.
This allows anyone, even those who do not own a computer, to help strengthen the
network and earn staking rewards for it by connecting their phone to a cold
staking node or pool.

New Particl Copay Version Released
[https://particl.news/new-particl-copay-version-released-d51c1623b313]
Today, we’re keeping the good momentum going ahead of the NYC Blockchain Week
by
announcing that we’ve released a new…
[https://particl.news/new-particl-copay-version-released-d51c1623b313]
particl.news
[https://particl.news/new-particl-copay-version-released-d51c1623b313]

The Particl Team Presents the Open Marketplace on Mainnet During the NYC
Blockchain Week
[https://particl.news/toward-the-particl-open-marketplace-262ab7142921] (May
10th-16th): And that brings us to our most recent series of events where Particl
presented the Open Marketplace, on mainnet, during both Magical Crypto
Conference and Consensus conferences. This entire week has proven to be a major
milestone for the project as well as an excellent mainnet test run for the
Particl Open Marketplace. Read the NYC Blockchain Recap
[https://particl.news/community-update-13-part-2-f4ca972abed0] section of this
Community Update for more details about the conferences.

Toward the Particl Open Marketplace
[https://particl.news/toward-the-particl-open-marketplace-262ab7142921]
The coming week is shaping up to be a very exciting one. Many Particl team
members are gathering in New York City for…
[https://particl.news/toward-the-particl-open-marketplace-262ab7142921]
particl.news
[https://particl.news/toward-the-particl-open-marketplace-262ab7142921]


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This concludes the project recap part of this Community Update. If you would
like to continue and read the other parts of the update, please follow these
links:

 * NYC Blockchain Week Recap
   [https://particl.news/community-update-13-part-2-f4ca972abed0]
 * Development Update
   [https://particl.news/community-update-13-part-3-4d53bcf621af]


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Particl Team

Indeed, this update introduced cold staking capabilities to Particl Copay as well as the possibility to enable cold staking for multi-signature addresses. This allows anyone, even those who do not own a computer, to help strengthen the network and earn staking rewards for it by connecting their phone to a cold staking node or pool.

New Particl Copay Version Released
Today, we’re keeping the good momentum going ahead of the NYC Blockchain Week by announcing that we’ve released a new…particl.news

Project Recap

It has now been a little while since our latest Community Update and since then, the Particl team has been extremely busy and a LOT has been happening! This Community Update will break down everything you need to know about the status of the project and put you up to speed with what’s going on.

We’ve broken this Community Update down into 3 pieces. This first part will recapitulate what’s been happening with the project since our last update. If you want to jump right into the NYC Blockchain Week recap or the Development Update, follow the links below to jump:

  • NYC Blockchain Week Recap
  • Development Update

What’s Been Accomplished Since our Last Community Update

2019 has been a busy year so far, and one that is shaping up to be pretty different than the last one. Whereas last year was focused on building the base layer for the Open Marketplace, this year has been all about refining it and starting to add new features on top of it. That doesn’t mean, however, that the only milestones reached this year were about the marketplace! Here’s a complete list of all the accomplishments and deliverables Particl had so far this year:

Particl Copay 5.4.1 Released (Jan 17th): A new version of Particl Copay was released on the 17th of January and marked a renewed active development for Particl’s mobile application. This update has been a major overhaul of the mobile application. It upgraded the application’s codebase, introduced a slew UI/UX and security improvements, fixed a couple of minor bugs, and enabled multi-currency support. This major Particl Copay update was pushed to set the stage for a bigger Particl Copay update that came a few weeks after: mobile multi-signature cold staking.

Particl Copay 5.4.1 Released
Yesterday, we released the 5.4.1 version of Particl Copay which sets the Particl mobile application to the latest Copay…particl.news

Particl Copay Released on iOS (Jan 24th): Particl Copay was finally released on iOS on the 24th of January. This means Particl’s mobile application is not exclusive to Android users anymore and now covers all mobile users.

Particl Copay Now Available on iOS
We are very excited to announce that Particl Copay, Particl’s mobile wallet, is now available on iOS! You can now…particl.news

Particl Meetup at CoinHouse, Paris (February 21st): Did you know that the biggest non-official Particl community is Particl FR, a French-speaking community? This is the reason why we organized, along with a few community members, a Particl meetup right in the heart of Paris at CoinHouse. The event held three presentations related to Particl and its protocol. You can watch these presentations by clicking on the following links:

  • Particl Open Marketplace Presentation (Lina Seiche)
  • Cold Staking & Cold Staking Pools Presentation (Guillaume Benayoun)
  • The Role of Intermediaries in Blockchain eCommerce (Albin Cauderlier)

Particl in Paris — Presentations at CoinHouse
We are thrilled to announce that Particl will be holding an event directly at the headquarters of CoinHouse, France’s…particl.news

Particl Desktop 1.3.1 Release (February 22nd): A new version of Particl Desktop was released on the 22nd of February. This release fixed the cold staking Zap feature to also work with cold staking pools as well as a few other minor issues. This Particl Desktop build automatically updated Particl Core nodes to the latest version, the one that would be compatible with the hardfork that was about to come.

Particl Desktop 1.3.1 Released
Earlier today, we released Particl Desktop 1.3.1 which had been in its pre-release stage for a bit more than two weeks…particl.news

Particl Network Hardforks (March 1st): On March 1st, the Particl main network went through a hardfork in order to prepare for the mainnet release of the Open Marketplace. This hardfork introduced both multi-signature cold staking capabilities to the network as well as paid SMSG messages. Paid SMSG messages are crucial to the functioning of the Open Marketplace on mainnet as they are used to carry listing messages around the network and make the governance system work. The hardfork went through without any issue and the network is now ready for the mainnet release of the marketplace.

Hardfork Successful
🎉 It’s official! 🎉particl.news

Particl Moves to Discord (March 7th): The Particl communications team has been mostly moved over to Discord. While we initially intended to move entirely on Discord and put Telegram in read-only mode, our travels around the world have made it clear we couldn’t do that as some countries exclusively use Telegram. Nevertheless, the team has been mostly moved over there and our Discord server will be the main platform we’ll focus on moving forward even though we will keep our Telegram channel open.

Particl is Officially Moving to Discord
The Particl community has been spread across many different platforms ever since we abandoned Slack more than a year…particl.news

Open Marketplace Alpha 2.0 Released (March 8th): On the 8th March, Particl reached a big milestone by releasing its Open Marketplace Alpha 2.0 on testnet. Unlike other testnet builds, this one is a permanent one, meaning that its download link hasn’t expired after 10 days. This release marked the completion of the base layer of the marketplace, meaning that the development team could now start focusing on adding features on top of it.

Particl Open Marketplace Alpha V2.0 Release & Development Update
It’s finally here! The Particl Open Marketplace Alpha V2.0 has just been released on Github and is now available for…particl.news

Particl Soft Rebrand (March 8th): At the same time Alpha 2.0 was released, Particl went through a soft rebrand to refresh its branding. Both Particl’s logo and color palette were updated, paving the way for a better creative direction. The soft rebrand was spearheaded by Gerlov van Ek, Particl’s Lead Designer, UI/UX, and developer.

Particl has a new look
Only by being obsessed with little things do amazing things emerge. — Andy Dunn This year Particl Project is set to…particl.news

Particl Booth at Hong Kong’s TOKEN2049 Conference (March 13rd-14th): A good chunk of the Particl team took a flight to present the Open Marketplace at TOKEN2049. In fact, this event, which we were a Gold sponsor for, marked the first big conference and kick-off point for our journey of creating awareness and introducing Particl’s first dApp, the Open Marketplace, to the crypto community. Not only was the Particl booth one of the very popular one around, but it also proved to be an excellent exercise for the team ahead of the two other major conferences Particl would be having a booth at: Consensus and Magical Crypto Conference. The team made great connections at the event and was able to gather a lot of feedback which we’ve used since then to improve the look and feel of the product.

TOKEN2049: A Recap & Review
It’s one week past the big event and by now, all Particl participants have safely made it back home. With our team…particl.news

New Mainnet Release Timeline Announced (March 20th): TOKEN2049 was a great time for the team to discuss the mainnet release strategy for the Open Marketplace. While it was initially announced that the marketplace would be released without privacy transactions, the team had decided to respect our commitment to privacy that we are making to our users by releasing the first mainnet version of the marketplace with the OMP Library and private transactions enabled by default.

Additionally, because the entire Open Marketplace had been built using the Bitcoin Core 0.18 codebase, we opted to push the official release only after Bitcoin itself would update its core to the 0.18 version. In the end, the release of Bitcoin Core 0.18 was delayed for about a month, an extra period of time the Particl team used to fine-tune and improve the OMP Library and the escrow mechanism. Read the Development Update section of this Community Update for more details about the status of the development and why we’ve finally opted to not release the Open Marketplace without its intended privacy features.

Marketplace Development Update
We packed our bags and headed off to TOKEN2049 last week with the Open Marketplace in tow. If you haven’t had a chance…particl.news

Multi-Wallets Make Their Way On Particl’s Testnet (April 11th): The first feature that was initially scheduled for Beta to be pushed on Particl’s Open Marketplace was multi-wallets. In fact, they’ve made their appearance on testnet on the 11th of April and are now, to this day, entirely ready for mainnet. For more information about what multi-wallets, follow the link below.

Multi-Wallets on Particl Desktop
Multi-wallets are not new to Particl. In fact, they have been available on Particl-Qt ever since Particl forked to…particl.news

Have a Particl-related project you want to build? Would like some integration to be worked in but it requires a fee? Want to fund an awareness campaign? These Community Contract Pools are just like your regular pool with the difference that instead of charging their users 2–3%, it charges them 100%. The funds collected by the operator are then used to fund the initiative initially proposed by the pool.

Community Contract Pools
If you’ve been around the community for some time, then you probably know that there have always been some discussions…particl.news

First Particl Lightning Network Transaction on Testnet (May 1st): The Lightning Network is a groundbreaking protocol that supports blockchains in order for them to sustain more transactions per seconds without being negatively impacted by it. It allows blockchain to safely execute any sort of transaction, including micro-transactions, instantly and at a near-zero cost. The Particl test network saw its first LN transaction take place on the 1st of May, which marks the official beginnings of a more pro-active research and development on how the Lightning Network could be integrated into Particl to improve its performance.

node.plaintext:
The coming week is shaping up to be a very exciting one. Many Particl team
members are gathering in New York City for the biggest event of the year in
crypto: the NYC Blockchain Week
[https://www.coindesk.com/events/consensus-2019/blockchain-week/events]. There, 
they will finally reveal the Open Marketplace on the real Particl network, the
mainnet, for the first time ever!

And that Open Marketplace is not “just another marketplace”, it is a world
first: a decentralized marketplace, fully autonomous and private, for a new
customer and seller experience

If you don’t know about it, let us present it to you!

In this blog post, we will tell you about:

 * The Particl Open Marketplace
 * The NYC Blockchain Week
 * The road to the marketplace & how we got there
 * The current state of development, and more

What’s the Particl Open Marketplace?
Simply put, the Open Marketplace is an entirely decentralized marketplace where
you can buy and sell products and services to anyone else in the world, in full
privacy. Think Alibaba or eBay, but on the blockchain and without a company
being in control of the platform. This means there is no risk of a third party
using its position of power to spy on you and impose its arbitrary rules and
fees.

The marketplace is fully autonomous, meaning that it doesn’t require any
third-party or intermediary to function. It instead restores the balance of
power back to the people by using a combination of blockchain and peer-to-peer
technologies. The absence of intermediaries alone is enough to bring the cost of
selling on the platform to a near-zero level.

This means both vendors and buyers end up with more money in their pockets.
Because vendors make more profit per sale, they can reduce their prices to
increase their volume and beat the competition. This, in turn, means customers
can potentially gain access to cheaper products!

The Particl Open Marketplace also utilizes a combination of various security
measures and privacy protocols to ensure that none of your data can be accessed
by anyone. It is a “private by default” marketplace, meaning that you don’t need
to take any extra step in order to protect your data — it’s just the way Particl
is.

Particl at the NYC Blockchain Week
The NYC Blockchain Week is a series of many crypto events happening within the
same timeframe in New York. It attracts the biggest names in the industry,
showcases the best blockchain projects, and unites the many different crypto
communities together for one exciting week. In a way, the NYC Blockchain Week is
to crypto what the World Cup is to football.

Particl in NYC
Particl is, of course, going to be a part of this event. In fact, you’ll be able
to come to meet us, right at our booth, at either Magical Crypto Conference or 
Consensus. That’s right! We’ll be having a booth at the two best conferences NYC
Blockchain Week 2019 has to offer and we’ll be demonstrating the Particl Open
Marketplace, in exclusivity, on mainnet!

Magical Crypto Conference (MCC)—11th & 12th of May
The Magical Crypto Conference [https://www.magicalcryptoconference.com/] is a
pure crypto-community conference. It is organized and hosted by the well known
“Magical Crypto Friends”, a group of 4 influencers in the crypto space: Charlie
Lee (Litecoin), Samson Mow (Blockstream CSO), Ricardo Spagni (Monero), and
“WhalePanda”

This is the perfect place to meet potential Open Marketplace users and is the
reason why we are so excited to be having a booth at this event. In fact, as MCC
is more of a pure crypto community conference, it attracts some of the crypto
pioneers and people that are already deeply interested by the true vision of
cryptocurrencies, privacy, decentralization, and personal freedom. A simple look
at the speaker list [https://www.magicalcryptoconference.com/#speakers] should
give you a good idea of the type of people that will attend the event.

Consensus by Coindesk—13th to the 15th of May
Started by Coindesk in 2015, Consensus
[https://www.coindesk.com/events/consensus-2019] is one of the first crypto
conference ever and the most prestigious. It has become the biggest
cryptocurrency event in the world and is a place where people mean business.

This will be the ideal place to meet various people from different areas of
expertise — media, marketing, law, vendors, suppliers, influencers, and, of
course, crypto fans. Such a varied crowd of people is sure to have a lot of
different feedback about the Open Marketplace, and we are really excited to see
the reaction of these people when faced with a modern blockchain product, on
mainnet.

Having a good chunk of the team at Consensus will also be ideal to meet people,
craft new relationships, and grow the amount of interest for the Particl
ecosystem.

Meet the Team
The Particl team is going to be 10 member/representative strong going into these
conferences.

 * Juha (Ludx) — Lead Open Marketplace Developer
 * Gerlof van Ek (Crz) — Lead Designer & Branding, UI/UX, Developer
 * Paul Schmitzer (Litebit) — Project Marketing & Strategy
 * Imran (Imyb) — Commercial & Partner Strategy
 * Cryptoguard — Communications & Strategy
 * Gloria (Katelady) — Communications & Strategy
 * Joe Fisher — eCommerce Strategy (Particl Advisor)
 * Lina Seiche — Lead Event Coordinator & Community Evangelist
 * Desi-Rae Campbell (Cryptoramble) — Education & Awareness
 * Joskye — Education & Awareness

Come to our booth at either MCC or Consensus and have a chat with us. We’ll be
giving out PART paper wallets, shirts/hoodies, webcam covers, stickers, pins,
and, most importantly, you’ll be able to test the Particl Open Marketplace live
on mainnet for the first time ever!

In the meantime, our other developers are hard at work, as per usual, preparing
the final build of the Open Marketplace so that it can be publicly released on
mainnet.

The Open Marketplace — 2 Great Years of Development
The Open Marketplace is quite something to see. It is a complex combination of
peer-to-peer and blockchain technologies mixed in with various privacy
protocols. It’s also never been attempted before, most of the development toward
the marketplace being true pioneering work. It supports a decentralized and
private cryptocurrency, an entirely decentralized escrow mechanism,
decentralized file hosting, metadata leak prevention, and etc.

To see all of the components and features of the Open Marketplace, read our
Privacy in eCommerce blog post by following this link: 
https://particl.news/privacy-in-ecommerce-part-3-6d5b0b1bf155

It has been under heavy and constant development for nearly two years. Almost
exactly one year ago, Particl released its first proof-of-concept on testnet
[https://particl.news/particl-marketplace-alpha-released-and-available-for-testing-3240739f7509]
, although with a much more basic version of what it has now become. At the
time, a simple buy and sell flow was available, without moderation tools,
without proposals, and without a user interface that’s as stable and
user-friendly as it is today.

All this time, throughout the cold crypto winter, the Particl team has been 
hard
at work [https://particl.news/community-update-12-part-2-2a35b005cb45#6dc9] to
deliver its long-anticipated Open Marketplace on mainnet. This much is evidenced
not only by looking at the gigantic amount of work being put on Github
[http://github.com/particl] but by the very noticeable progress being made on
the Open Marketplace itself. This is why, during this whole time, the Particl
project has found itself being ranked high in almost all development-related
rankings of blockchain projects
[https://particl.news/community-update-12-part-2-2a35b005cb45#6dc9].

And here we are, in New York City, presenting the Particl Open Marketplace live
on the main network for the first time ever!

What’s next?
After 2 years of development, the team is really happy to say that the wait is
nearly over 🙌

Starting from the idea of a decentralized marketplace running on the blockchain,
Particl created a first:

→ an Open Marketplace, always live and decentralized, where everything is
thought of with maximum privacy and security in mind. Everything on Particl is
private, from its untraceable currency to its marketplace, without forgetting
its proposal, escrow, messaging, file hosting systems, and more.

And this is only the beginning, a lot will come after the release of the Open
Marketplace on mainnet:

 * Advanced Open Marketplace features: secure messaging, privacy transactions,
   inventory management, in-client package tracking, review system, fiat price
   pegging, and etc.
 * “Marketplace Bubbles” : your own private market on the particl network!
 * CT Bulletproofs, while still being tested on the test network, will improve
   drastically the size of privacy transactions for any trades of the network.
   Don’t forget that Particl uses RingCT technology (on testnet), a first on the
   Bitcoin codebase!
 * Particl Lightning Network (our first testnet transaction just happened a few
   days ago
   [https://particl.news/particl-lightning-network-now-available-on-testnet-eb87a5ab65cd]
   ) and Atomic Swap, so that anyone can change its Bitcoins, Litecoins,
   Moneros, and more on the marketplace to buy anything in the blink of an eye!
 * Developer SDK so that anyone can easily build their own decentralized
   applications on the Particl network.

We are excited to show what true privacy in eCommerce looks like this week in
New York, both at MCC and Consensus conference. Although we may be extremely
busy during that time, we will not forget to report everything that happens here
so that you can live these events with us. If you are there, do not hesitate to
pass at our booth to test the marketplace and get some Particl or Bitcoin
branded goodies.

See you soon!

The Particl Team
node.html:
The coming week is shaping up to be a very exciting one. Many Particl team members are gathering in New York City for the biggest event of the year in crypto: the NYC Blockchain Week. There, they will finally reveal the Open Marketplace on the real Particl network, the mainnet, for the first time ever!

And that Open Marketplace is not “just another marketplace”, it is a world first: a decentralized marketplace, fully autonomous and private, for a new customer and seller experience

If you don’t know about it, let us present it to you!

In this blog post, we will tell you about:

  • The Particl Open Marketplace
  • The NYC Blockchain Week
  • The road to the marketplace & how we got there
  • The current state of development, and more

What’s the Particl Open Marketplace?

Simply put, the Open Marketplace is an entirely decentralized marketplace where you can buy and sell products and services to anyone else in the world, in full privacy. Think Alibaba or eBay, but on the blockchain and without a company being in control of the platform. This means there is no risk of a third party using its position of power to spy on you and impose its arbitrary rules and fees.

The marketplace is fully autonomous, meaning that it doesn’t require any third-party or intermediary to function. It instead restores the balance of power back to the people by using a combination of blockchain and peer-to-peer technologies. The absence of intermediaries alone is enough to bring the cost of selling on the platform to a near-zero level.

This means both vendors and buyers end up with more money in their pockets. Because vendors make more profit per sale, they can reduce their prices to increase their volume and beat the competition. This, in turn, means customers can potentially gain access to cheaper products!

The Particl Open Marketplace also utilizes a combination of various security measures and privacy protocols to ensure that none of your data can be accessed by anyone. It is a “private by default” marketplace, meaning that you don’t need to take any extra step in order to protect your data — it’s just the way Particl is.

Particl at the NYC Blockchain Week

The NYC Blockchain Week is a series of many crypto events happening within the same timeframe in New York. It attracts the biggest names in the industry, showcases the best blockchain projects, and unites the many different crypto communities together for one exciting week. In a way, the NYC Blockchain Week is to crypto what the World Cup is to football.

Particl in NYC

Particl is, of course, going to be a part of this event. In fact, you’ll be able to come to meet us, right at our booth, at either Magical Crypto Conference or Consensus. That’s right! We’ll be having a booth at the two best conferences NYC Blockchain Week 2019 has to offer and we’ll be demonstrating the Particl Open Marketplace, in exclusivity, on mainnet!

Magical Crypto Conference (MCC) — 11th & 12th of May

The Magical Crypto Conference is a pure crypto-community conference. It is organized and hosted by the well known “Magical Crypto Friends”, a group of 4 influencers in the crypto space: Charlie Lee (Litecoin), Samson Mow (Blockstream CSO), Ricardo Spagni (Monero), and “WhalePanda”

This is the perfect place to meet potential Open Marketplace users and is the reason why we are so excited to be having a booth at this event. In fact, as MCC is more of a pure crypto community conference, it attracts some of the crypto pioneers and people that are already deeply interested by the true vision of cryptocurrencies, privacy, decentralization, and personal freedom. A simple look at the speaker list should give you a good idea of the type of people that will attend the event.

Consensus by Coindesk — 13th to the 15th of May

Started by Coindesk in 2015, Consensus is one of the first crypto conference ever and the most prestigious. It has become the biggest cryptocurrency event in the world and is a place where people mean business.

This will be the ideal place to meet various people from different areas of expertise — media, marketing, law, vendors, suppliers, influencers, and, of course, crypto fans. Such a varied crowd of people is sure to have a lot of different feedback about the Open Marketplace, and we are really excited to see the reaction of these people when faced with a modern blockchain product, on mainnet.

Having a good chunk of the team at Consensus will also be ideal to meet people, craft new relationships, and grow the amount of interest for the Particl ecosystem.

Meet the Team

The Particl team is going to be 10 member/representative strong going into these conferences.

  • Juha (Ludx) — Lead Open Marketplace Developer
  • Gerlof van Ek (Crz) — Lead Designer & Branding, UI/UX, Developer
  • Paul Schmitzer (Litebit) — Project Marketing & Strategy
  • Imran (Imyb) — Commercial & Partner Strategy
  • Cryptoguard — Communications & Strategy
  • Gloria (Katelady) — Communications & Strategy
  • Joe Fisher — eCommerce Strategy (Particl Advisor)
  • Lina Seiche — Lead Event Coordinator & Community Evangelist
  • Desi-Rae Campbell (Cryptoramble) — Education & Awareness
  • Joskye — Education & Awareness

Come to our booth at either MCC or Consensus and have a chat with us. We’ll be giving out PART paper wallets, shirts/hoodies, webcam covers, stickers, pins, and, most importantly, you’ll be able to test the Particl Open Marketplace live on mainnet for the first time ever!

In the meantime, our other developers are hard at work, as per usual, preparing the final build of the Open Marketplace so that it can be publicly released on mainnet.

The Open Marketplace — 2 Great Years of Development

The Open Marketplace is quite something to see. It is a complex combination of peer-to-peer and blockchain technologies mixed in with various privacy protocols. It’s also never been attempted before, most of the development toward the marketplace being true pioneering work. It supports a decentralized and private cryptocurrency, an entirely decentralized escrow mechanism, decentralized file hosting, metadata leak prevention, and etc.

To see all of the components and features of the Open Marketplace, read our Privacy in eCommerce blog post by following this link: https://particl.news/privacy-in-ecommerce-part-3-6d5b0b1bf155

It has been under heavy and constant development for nearly two years. Almost exactly one year ago, Particl released its first proof-of-concept on testnet, although with a much more basic version of what it has now become. At the time, a simple buy and sell flow was available, without moderation tools, without proposals, and without a user interface that’s as stable and user-friendly as it is today.

All this time, throughout the cold crypto winter, the Particl team has been hard at work to deliver its long-anticipated Open Marketplace on mainnet. This much is evidenced not only by looking at the gigantic amount of work being put on Github but by the very noticeable progress being made on the Open Marketplace itself. This is why, during this whole time, the Particl project has found itself being ranked high in almost all development-related rankings of blockchain projects.

And here we are, in New York City, presenting the Particl Open Marketplace live on the main network for the first time ever!

What’s next?

After 2 years of development, the team is really happy to say that the wait is nearly over 🙌

Starting from the idea of a decentralized marketplace running on the blockchain, Particl created a first:

→ an Open Marketplace, always live and decentralized, where everything is thought of with maximum privacy and security in mind. Everything on Particl is private, from its untraceable currency to its marketplace, without forgetting its proposal, escrow, messaging, file hosting systems, and more.

And this is only the beginning, a lot will come after the release of the Open Marketplace on mainnet:

  • Advanced Open Marketplace features: secure messaging, privacy transactions, inventory management, in-client package tracking, review system, fiat price pegging, and etc.
  • “Marketplace Bubbles” : your own private market on the particl network!
  • CT Bulletproofs, while still being tested on the test network, will improve drastically the size of privacy transactions for any trades of the network. Don’t forget that Particl uses RingCT technology (on testnet), a first on the Bitcoin codebase!
  • Particl Lightning Network (our first testnet transaction just happened a few days ago) and Atomic Swap, so that anyone can change its Bitcoins, Litecoins, Moneros, and more on the marketplace to buy anything in the blink of an eye!
  • Developer SDK so that anyone can easily build their own decentralized applications on the Particl network.

We are excited to show what true privacy in eCommerce looks like this week in New York, both at MCC and Consensus conference. Although we may be extremely busy during that time, we will not forget to report everything that happens here so that you can live these events with us. If you are there, do not hesitate to pass at our booth to test the marketplace and get some Particl or Bitcoin branded goodies.

See you soon!

The Particl Team

node.plaintext:
❄️Cold Staking Capabilities Arrive to Mobile❄️
Today, we’re keeping the good momentum going ahead of the NYC Blockchain Week by
announcing that we’ve released a new Particl Copay version, this time with cold
staking and multi-signature cold staking capabilities enabled!

That’s right! You can now earn some staking passive income even if you store
your coins on a mobile device. Nobody left behind, that’s Particl way!

The Particl Copay mobile wallet can be downloaded by following these links:

Particl Copay - Apps on Google Play
[https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.particl.copay]
The Copay wallet has a convenient payment proposal flow that supports
multi-signature addresses and batch processing…

Update 1: The leaderboard is currently being updated. It will be back online
within a few hours✌️

UPDATE 2: The sign up payouts for the Awareness Campaign have been executed
earlier today. With this, the Awareness Campaign is now resumed
[https://friends.particl.community], with sign up payouts disabled, so that you
can continue earning staking shares by referring your friends to Particl. When
you reach 12 points, you will earn your first staking share. Each additional
point will reward you with a staking share.

For more details, read our latest blog post on the Awareness Campaign by
following this link: 
https://particl.news/particl-awareness-campaign-update-d94347324121


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

On May 1st, we launched the first ever ambassador campaign: the Particl
Awareness Campaign
[https://particl.news/particl-ambassador-initiative-70dedea49eef]. The Awareness
Campaign’s mission is to acquire new users and kick-start the Particl economy,
plain and simple. More users on the Particl Open Marketplace means more products
available for sale, more buyers looking for those products, and, of course,
better privacy due to the nature of Particl’s CT & RingCT privacy protocol.

This campaign will run until mid-July and give you the opportunity to earn
points that can be redeemed against PART prizes and even lifetime staking
shares. All you need to do to start earning points it to let your friends know
about Particl and get them to sign up with us!

Rules
 * Visit https://friends.particl.community
 * Sign up with your email
 * Get your personal link and share it with your friends
 * Start raking in points
 * Send your private address to friends@particl.io with the same email you
   signed up with to claim your prizes.

> Note: Signing up with us will earn you 1 point. Each friend you get to sign up
with us will earn you 1 additional point.
Prize
 * 1 lifetime staking share per friend that signs up (12+ points required)

Because the payouts cap has been reached in just under 16 hours, sign up payouts
are now complete and disabled. But don’t worry, you can still earn PART by
accumulating staking shares. All you need to do is get more than 10 of your
friends to sign up with us!

After getting 10 of your friends to sign up with Particl, each additional one
will reward you with 1 lifetime share of the revenue made by the Ambassador
Staking Pool [https://stake.particl.community/].

To see the first staking share payment round of the campaign, follow this link: 
https://explorer.particl.io/block/e559921895d05a53025dcb84f61ea42fd0362a786d3e848e640015755ba9f0d4

How to Claim Your Prize
To claim your prize, all you need to do is send us, by email, a private address.
Don’t worry, it’s actually pretty easy to acquire. Simply follow the steps
below:

 * Download Particl Desktop
   [https://github.com/particl/particl-desktop/releases/tag/1.3.1] (mainnet)
 * Create a new account (make sure to backup your seed somewhere safe!)
 * Go to the RECEIVE tab located in the sidebar on the left
 * Click on the Private Address tab located at the top of the RECEIVE page
 * Click on the green Copy Address button to copy it to your clipboard
 * Send your private address to friends@particl.io with the same email you
   signed up with to claim your prizes.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To learn everything there is to know about this campaign, visit our blog post by
following the link below.

[https://particl.news/announcement-particl-awareness-campaign-464baa8477b5]

node.plaintext:
The First Ambassador Campaign

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Payout cap has been reached and the campaign has been halted! The Particl
Awareness Campaign has been overwhelmingly successful in a short period of time!
We appreciate everyone’s effort as we’ve had more than 18,000 people
participating, and 2,000 unique downloads of the marketplace. Thank you for
participating, and please join https://t.me/particlawareness for any questions
you may have.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You and your friends are going to love using Particl!

Recently, we introduced Community Contract Pools, a decentralized and
community-led program designed to fund various initiatives to raise awareness.
We’ve also announced that we’re kick-starting this new ‘pool economy’ by
creating an awareness campaign to acquire users before the imminent launch of
our decentralized marketplace. This will be the first-ever initiative to be
backed by a Community Contract Pool!

Now for all the nitty gritty details! We believe we’ve designed the best and
most innovative campaign to gain traction on our marketplace and get it started
on the right foot.

Earn $PART Coins Just for Signing Up!
Grab the products you’re looking for and pay for them with crypto!The Awareness
Campaign’s mission is to acquire new users and kick-start the Particl economy,
plain and simple. More users on the Particl Open Marketplace means more products
available for sale, more buyers looking for those products, and, of course,
better privacy due to the nature of Particl’s CT & RingCT privacy protocol.

A provably effective technique to acquire new users in the startup world is the
traditional referral system — get a friend to try the platform, and get some
benefits in return. We all know the very popular Dropbox referral model that, in
exchange for referring friends, gives you free additional storage capacity on
your account.

Earn More by Getting Your Friends to Sign Up!
The first Awareness Campaign is indeed a referral program, and it’s a damn good
one! It leverages Community Contract Pools to make it very appealing to
participate in, as you’ll see. The rules are super simple.

Awareness Campaign Rules
 * Visit https://friends.particl.community/
 * Register with your email to start participating in the campaign
 * Get your personal link and share it with your friends
 * Start raking in points

Prizes
Getting friends to use Particl is easy! Each friend you get to sign up nets you
1 point and points earn you prizes paid in $PART.

 * Get $5 worth of $PART for signing up
 * Get $10 worth of $PART when 5 of your friends sign up
 * Get $20 worth of $PART when 10 of your friends sign up
 * Get 1 lifetime staking share per additional friend that signs up (10+)

How to Claim Your Prize
To claim your prize, all you need to do is send us, by email, a private address.
Don’t worry, it’s actually pretty easy to acquire. Simply follow the steps
below:

 * Download Particl Desktop [https://particl.io/downloads/] (mainnet)
 * Create a new account (make sure to backup your seed somewhere safe!)
 * Go to the RECEIVE tab located in the sidebar on the left
 * Click on the Private Address tab located at the top of the RECEIVE page
 * Click on the green Copy Address button to copy it to your clipboard
 * Send your private address to friends@particl.io with the same email you
   signed up with to claim your prizes.

How to get your Particl private address and claim your rewards> Note: Payouts will exclusively be made using Confidential Transactions and
require that you send us a private address. That means regular addresses, such
as those used by exchanges, won’t work.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lifetime Staking Shares as Reward
In fact, participants who successfully get more than 10 of their friends to use
Particl will earn lifetime shares of the Ambassador Community Contract Pool
[https://stake.particl.community/]’s staking revenue.

Yes, you’ve heard that right!

If you teach 10 of your friends about the biggest revolution eCommerce has ever
seen and get them to sign-up, you can start earning a steady income from this
pool for life!

As mentioned above, each friend you get to use Particl gives you one point. 10
points get you $20 worth of PART. But what if you go above and beyond and get
25, 100, or even 1,000 people to use Particl!

That’s where it gets interesting…

In fact, once you reach 12 points, you’ll earn yourself a single share of the
staking revenue made by the Ambassador Community Contract Pool. Then, for each
additional friend you refer, you’ll get an additional share. Simply put, you get
(X-11) shares for every friend you get to use Particl.

For example, if you get 34 (X) people to register their email to the campaign
and use Particl, you’ll get 24 shares (X-10). If you refer 8 (X) friends, then
you’ll get 0 shares, but you’ll still earn $10 worth of PART since you
successfully got more than 5 of your friends to sign up.

To learn more about staking shares and the Ambassador Pool, read our Ambassador
Pool FAQ on Particl Wiki by following the link below.

initiative. It is a cold staking pool that…
[https://particl.wiki/faq_ambassador]particl.wiki
[https://particl.wiki/faq_ambassador]


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Let’s Sum it up!
Put simply, this campaign is about acquiring new users and get them to benefit
from what Particl has to offer.

Earn $5 worth of PART simply by registering your email with us. Then, you’ll get
a custom link that you can send to your friends so they, also, can participate
in this campaign and discover Particl at the same time.

Each friend you refer to the platform earns you a point. You can earn $10 worth
of PART if you get 5 friends to use Particl, and $20 worth of PART for 10
friends.

Once you reach 11 points, you’ll start earning lifetime shares of the staking
revenue made by the Ambassador Community Contract Pool.

Easy, right? It doesn’t get more complicated than that!

The Fine Prints
 * The contest will run until the 16th of July, 2019.
 * To claim your prize, you need to send us a private address from the same
   email you used to register to the campaign. Sending a private address
   requires Particl Desktop and is not possible to do from Particl’s mobile
   application.
 * Payouts will be executed for the first time on the 23rd of May 2019, and will
   then be payed out every 2 weeks after that point.
 * Staking rewards, proportionally to how many shares you own, will be paid for
   the first time on the 23rd of May 2019, and will then be paid out every 2
   weeks after that point. Learn more about what are staking rewards here: 
   https://particl.wiki/faq_ambassador
 * The campaign has a hidden payout cap. If the amount of payouts executed
   exceeds this cap, payouts will be disabled. After that point, it will only be
   possible to earn staking shares. This is a limited time offer, payouts will
   be paid on a first arrived, first served basis!
 * Shares are tracked internally by the team, but you can monitor them by
   checking out the leaderboard available at this link: 
   https://particl.news/particl-awareness-campaign-leaderboard-649494d8177a
 * Points displayed on the campaign’s page and on the leaderboard may differ.
   Only points displayed on the leaderboard are valid.

How Will Your Data be Used
 * We will not share your email or data with any party.
 * Your email will exclusively be used to send out newsletters and promotional
   content. You can always opt-out of these emails by clicking the unsubscribe 
   button in the email’s footer
 * We will not track any of your data.
 * The referral platform we use may collect some of your data. Refer to their
   privacy policy to know all the details: 
   https://kickofflabs.com/privacy-policy


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We thank you for participating in this campaign. Let’s tell the world about the
benefits of Particl and start growing our community today!

The Particl Team

The First Ambassador Campaign

Payout cap has been reached and the campaign has been halted! The Particl Awareness Campaign has been overwhelmingly successful in a short period of time! We appreciate everyone’s effort as we’ve had more than 18,000 people participating, and 2,000 unique downloads of the marketplace. Thank you for participating, and please join https://t.me/particlawareness for any questions you may have.

A provably effective technique to acquire new users in the startup world is the traditional referral system — get a friend to try the platform, and get some benefits in return. We all know the very popular Dropbox referral model that, in exchange for referring friends, gives you free additional storage capacity on your account.
